ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "primary_care_physician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary care physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_primary_care_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_care_physician_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "glucose" INTEGER /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure reading of the patient */,
  "insulin" INTEGER /* Insulin level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of measurement */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Outcome indicator (e.g., 1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metrics were recorded */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the health metrics were recorded */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who recorded the metrics */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor (e.g., endocrinology) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital or clinic */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the doctor registered with the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., follow-up, initial consultation) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who prescribed the treatment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who ordered the test */,
  "lab_facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lab facility */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_lab_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_facility_id") REFERENCES lab_facilities ("lab_facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who diagnosed the condition */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor associated with the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the insurance plan */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., full, partial) */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the insurance policy expires */,
  "insured_name" TEXT /* Name of the insured (if different from the patient) */,
  "relationship_to_patient" TEXT /* Relationship of the insured to the patient (e.g., self, spouse, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the services rendered */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of billing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the billing (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service rendered */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who provided the service */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance record */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, insurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_insurance_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_id") REFERENCES insurance ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_facilities" (
  "lab_facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lab facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lab facility */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lab facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lab facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_facility_id")
)
